languages.text: {n}Стоящий за вашей спиной Ульфар принюхивается, шумно втягивая воздух. Он напряжен, как хищник, учуявший чужую кровь.{/n} "Эттфатер, присмотрись. Тот, что пленен и скован железом, пахнет, как один из моих собратьев. Раз пленили живьем — слаб, должно быть".

{n}Ulfar, standing behind you, sniffs, inhaling noisily. He tenses, like a predator scenting the blood of another living creature.{/n} "Aett-Vater, look at this. The one captured and chained in iron smells like one of my brothers. If he was taken alive, he must be weak."
languages.original_text: {n}Стоящий за вашей спиной Ульфар принюхивается, шумно втягивая воздух. Он напряжен, как хищник, учуявший чужую кровь.{/n} "Эттфатер, присмотрись. Тот, что пленен и скован железом, пахнет, как один из моих собратьев. Раз пленили живьем — слаб, должно быть".

traits.locale_text: {n}Ulfar, standing behind you, sniffs, inhaling noisily. He tenses, like a predator scenting the blood of another living creature.{/n} "Aett-Vater, look at this. The one captured and chained in iron smells like one of my brothers. If he was taken alive, he must be weak."

{n}Ulfar, standing behind you, sniffs, inhaling noisily. He tenses, like a predator scenting the blood of another living creature.{/n} "Aett-Vater, look at this. The one captured and chained in iron smells like one of my brothers. If he was taken alive, he must be weak."

{n}Ulfar, standing behind you, sniffs, inhaling noisily. He tenses, like a predator scenting the blood of another living creature.{/n} "Aett-Vater, look at this. The one captured and chained in iron smells like one of my brothers. If he was taken alive, he must be weak."

languages.text: {n}ウルファルは君の後方で鼻を鳴らし、大きな息を吸い込む。獲物を嗅ぎつけたような緊張した様子だ。{/n}「アエット・ヴァター、見て。鉄で捕らえられ鎖で繋がれた奴は、俺の兄弟の匂いがする。生きて捕まれば、弱っているはずだ」
languages.original_text: {n}Ulfar, standing behind you, sniffs, inhaling noisily. He tenses, like a predator scenting the blood of another living creature.{/n} "Aett-Vater, look at this. The one captured and chained in iron smells like one of my brothers. If he was taken alive, he must be weak."

traits.locale_text: ウルファルは君の後方で鼻を鳴らし、大きな息を吸い込む。獲物を嗅ぎつけたような緊張した様子だ。{n}「アエット・ヴァター、見て。鉄で捕らえられ鎖で繋がれた奴は、俺の兄弟の匂いがする。生きて捕まれば、弱っているはずだ。」

languages.text: {n}Ulfar, situado detrás de ti, inspira sonoramente. Se tensa, como un depredador que detecta a otro ser vivo.{/n} «Mire, Aett-Vater. El que está capturado y encadenado huele como mis hermanos. Si lo capturaron vivo, debe de estar débil».
languages.original_text: {n}Ulfar, standing behind you, sniffs, inhaling noisily. He tenses, like a predator scenting the blood of another living creature.{/n} "Aett-Vater, look at this. The one captured and chained in iron smells like one of my brothers. If he was taken alive, he must be weak."

traits.locale_text: {n}Ulfar, situado detrás de ti, inspira sonoramente. Se tensa, como un depredador que detecta a otro ser vivo.{/n} «Mire, Aett-Vater. El que está capturado y encadenado huele como mis hermanos. Si lo capturaron vivo, debe de estar débil».

languages.text: {n}你身后的乌尔法翕动鼻翼，粗重地吸入空气。他绷紧身躯，像一个嗅到了血腥味的掠食者。{/n}“狼领，看看。被铁链锁住的那个，闻起来像我的兄弟。既然被活捉，那他肯定是个软蛋。”
languages.original_text: {n}Ulfar, standing behind you, sniffs, inhaling noisily. He tenses, like a predator scenting the blood of another living creature.{/n} "Aett-Vater, look at this. The one captured and chained in iron smells like one of my brothers. If he was taken alive, he must be weak."

traits.locale_text: {n}你身后的乌尔法翕动鼻翼，粗重地吸入空气。他绷紧身躯，像一个嗅到了血腥味的掠食者。{/n}“狼领，看看。被铁链锁住的那个，闻起来像我的兄弟。既然被活捉，那他肯定是个软蛋。”

languages.text: {n}Hinter dir atmet Ulfar hörbar ein. Er ist angespannt wie ein Raubtier, das das Blut eines anderen Lebewesens wittert.{/n} "Aett-Vater, seht Euch das an. Dieser in Ketten gelegte Krieger riecht wie einer meiner Brüder. Wenn er lebend gefasst wurde, muss er geschwächt gewesen sein."
languages.original_text: {n}Ulfar, standing behind you, sniffs, inhaling noisily. He tenses, like a predator scenting the blood of another living creature.{/n} "Aett-Vater, look at this. The one captured and chained in iron smells like one of my brothers. If he was taken alive, he must be weak."

traits.locale_text: {n}Hinter dir atmet Ulfar hörbar ein. Er ist angespannt wie ein Raubtier, das das Blut eines anderen Lebewesens wittert.{/n} "Aett-Vater, seht Euch das an. Dieser in Ketten gelegte Krieger riecht wie einer meiner Brüder. Wenn er lebend gefasst wurde, muss er geschwächt gewesen sein."

languages.text: {n}Arkanda duran Ulfar, gürültülü bir şekilde nefes alıp vererek havayı kokluyor. Başka bir canlı yaratığın kanının kokusunu alan bir yırtıcı gibi geriliyor.{/n} "Aett-Vater, şuna bak. Yakalanıp demire zincirlenen, kardeşlerimden biri gibi kokuyor. Sağ yakalandıysa zayıf olmalı."
languages.original_text: {n}Ulfar, standing behind you, sniffs, inhaling noisily. He tenses, like a predator scenting the blood of another living creature.{/n} "Aett-Vater, look at this. The one captured and chained in iron smells like one of my brothers. If he was taken alive, he must be weak."

traits.locale_text: {n}Arkanda duran Ulfar, gürültülü bir şekilde nefes alıp vererek havayı kokluyor. Başka bir canlı yaratığın kanının kokusunu alan bir yırtıcı gibi geriliyor.{/n} "Aett-Vater, şuna bak. Yakalanıp demire zincirlenen, kardeşlerimden biri gibi kokuyor. Sağ yakalandıysa zayıf olmalı."

languages.text: {n}Debout dans votre dos, Ulfar renifle bruyamment, tendu tel un prédateur humant l'odeur du sang.{/n} « Aett-vater, regardez-moi ça. Celui qui s'est fait capturer et enchaîner a la même odeur que mes frères. S'il a été capturé vivant, c'est qu'il doit être faible. »
languages.original_text: {n}Ulfar, standing behind you, sniffs, inhaling noisily. He tenses, like a predator scenting the blood of another living creature.{/n} "Aett-Vater, look at this. The one captured and chained in iron smells like one of my brothers. If he was taken alive, he must be weak."
